equipment.label: Bracelet
equipment.name: Rune Manacles of the Lost Dynasty

explanations: Finalists were recalculated through the complete build calculator.
Known set effects were included.
Set bonus active: Deathless One at 2 pieces (5/6 equipped).
Set bonus active: Deathless One at 4 pieces (5/6 equipped).

Heroic Calanthia's Touch: Effect 1: Heavy Attack Chance +220 — feeds #2 PvP Ranged Heavy Attack Chance; alternatives: Perception +11, Fortitude +11, Evasion +220. Effect 2: Hit Chance +220 — feeds #5 PvP Ranged Hit Chance; alternatives: Perception +11, Fortitude +11, Evasion +220. Effect 3: Ranged Hit Chance +220 — feeds #5 PvP Ranged Hit Chance; alternatives: Perception +11, Fortitude +11, Evasion +220.

Heroic Choking Conviction: Effect 1: Heavy Attack Chance +220 — feeds #2 PvP Ranged Heavy Attack Chance; alternatives: Dexterity +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11. Effect 2: Dexterity +11 — improves no ranked goal; kept as a deterministic tie-breaker; alternatives: Wisdom +11, Perception +11, Fortitude +11. Effect 3: Hit Chance +220 — feeds #5 PvP Ranged Hit Chance; alternatives: Dexterity +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11.
Main Hand: Attack Assist Defense supplies +4 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Off Hand: Attack Assist Defense supplies +4 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Head: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Chest: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Necklace: Attack Defense Assist supplies +3 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Ring 1: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Perception toward attribute milestones.
Ring 2: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Perception toward attribute milestones.
PvP Ranged Critical Hit Chance: 25660 at priority 1; normalized contribution +0.292.
PvP Ranged Heavy Attack Chance: 18440 at priority 2; normalized contribution +0.854.
Critical Damage: 4460 at priority 3; normalized contribution +0.033.
PvP Damage: 110 at priority 4; normalized contribution +0.002.
PvP Ranged Hit Chance: 43854 at priority 5; normalized contribution +0.014; minimum 30000 met.
Max Health: 38881 at priority 6; normalized contribution +0.001; minimum 38000 met.
No selected goal finished below the fixed objective baseline.
assumptions: Item Potentials are excluded from calculations and recommendations in this release; same-item selections are preserved.
59 available attribute points were redistributed across STR, DEX, INT, PER, and CON.
This is a theoretical catalogue build. Ownership and acquisition cost are not scored.
Eight passive skills were selected at up to level 20.
Crossbow mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Dagger mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Only decoded-proven persistent Skill Cores are optimized; conditional or unsupported cores receive no invented static value.
The game allows repeated Equipment Skills, but exact scoring activates only one copy in the current fixed-level catalogue.
Exactly three normal rune sockets are considered; normal rune rows may repeat.
No more than one Chaos rune is used per item.
warnings: This is a bounded search, so the result is the best loadout found rather than proof of the mathematical global optimum.
